CustomField.description: Difference calculated between Assumed MR and Actual MR based on the Reconciliation Schedule. This field will be zero for Excess Utilization type of Reconciliation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Difference calculated between Assumed MR and Actual MR based on the Reconciliation Schedule. This field will be zero for Excess Utilization type of Reconciliation.
CustomField.label: Total Amount
